---
title: "League Trends"
description: "Rolling MLB pitch usage and production trends from The SABRhood league movement desk."
---

::: {.page-intro .page-intro--dark .league-trends-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">League movement desk</span>

# Watch baseball change shape

Rolling pitch choices and production rates reveal the league-wide adjustments
that one-day leaderboards cannot show.
:::

{{< include includes/league-trends.html >}}
